steps.title: Write the perimeter expression
steps.content:
A rectangle's perimeter is twice the length plus twice the width. With length $48$ and width $x$:
$$P=2(48)+2x=96+2x$$

steps.title: Use at most
steps.content:
At most $140$ means less than or equal to $140$. Therefore:
$$2x+96\le140$$
The answer is A.
